Description

recoder.kit
 
recoder.kit.transformation
 
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.service

    Methods in recoder.kit that return types with arguments of type Method
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
    Query that returns a list of methods would redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method methodName in type with specified signature .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, Method method)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method method .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(NameInfo ni, CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, ClassType type, String methodName, List<Type> signature)
     
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(Method m)
    Query that returns a list of methods that the given method directly overwrites or implements.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(NameInfo ni, ClassType base, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Query returning the methods which a method in the given class with the given name and signature would redefine.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefiningMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine or implement the given method.
    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Method
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Problem
    MethodKit.checkMethodRedefinition(ProgramModelInfo pmi, Method redefined, Method redefining)
    Query that finds out problems if one method redefines another one.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getAllRelatedMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xrsi, Method method)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine, implement or are overriden or implemented each other starting from method method .
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefinedMethods(Method m)
    Query that returns a list of methods that the given method directly overwrites or implements.
    static List<Method>
    MethodKit.getRedefiningMethods(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m)
    Query that returns a list of methods that redefine or implement the given method.
    static List<MemberReference>
    MethodKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Method m, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given method that are contained within the given tree.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.isMain(NameInfo ni, Method m)
    Updating query that checks if the given method is a main method.
    static boolean
    MethodKit.isSerializationMethod(NameInfo ni, Method m)
    Updating query that checks if the given method is one of the serialization methods writeObject,readObject ,writeReplace,readResolve.

    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct)
    Returns the methods locally defined within the given class type.
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for the given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
     
    List<Method>
    ProgramModelInfo.getMethods(ClassType ct, String name, List<Type> signature, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs, ClassType context)
    Returns the list of most specific methods with the given name that are defined in the given type or in a supertype where they are visible for a second given type, and have a signature that is compatible to the given one.
    List<Method>
    SourceInfo.getMethods(TypeDeclaration td)
    Returns the locally defined methods of the given type declaration.
    List<Method>
    SourceInfo.getMethods(MethodReference mr)
    Returns all methods that are applicable with respect to the given reference.

    DefaultProgramModelInfo.doThreePhaseFilter(List<? extends Method> methods, List<Type> signature, String name, ClassType context, List<? extends TypeArgument> typeArgs)
     
    void
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.filterApplicableMethods(List<Method> list, String name, List<Type> signature, ClassType context)
     
    void
    ProgramModelInfo.filterApplicableMethods(List<Method> list, String name, List<Type> signature, ClassType context)
    Retains methods that are applicable for a given call.
    void
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethods(List<Method> list)
     
    void
    ProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethods(List<Method> list)
    Retains methods with signatures that are not compatible to each other.
    void
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase2(List<Method> list)
     
    void
    ProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase2(List<Method> list)
    Same as filterMostSpecificMethods, but takes auto(un)boxing into account
    void
    DefaultProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase3(List<Method> list)
     
    void
    ProgramModelInfo.filterMostSpecificMethodsPhase3(List<Method> list)
    Same as filterMostSpecificMethods, but takes auto(un)boxing and variable arity (vararg) methods into account
